description: Update sovereign collect name from Queen to Sovereign
Update sovereign collect text from Queen Elizabeth to King Charles
old:
Almighty God, fountain of all goodness, bless our Sovereign
Lady, Queen Elizabeth, and all who are in authority under her;
that they may order all things in wisdom and equity,
righteousness and peace, to the honour of your name, and the
good of your Church and people; through Jesus Christ our Lord.
new:
Almighty God, fountain of all goodness, bless our Sovereign
Lord, King Charles, and all who are in authority under him;
that they may order all things in wisdom and equity,
righteousness and peace, to the honour of your name, and the
good of your Church and people; through Jesus Christ our Lord.

description: Correct p.412 feast name: extractor picked up Canada Day heading (bottom of page) instead of Saint Peter and Saint Paul (whose collect appears at top of same page)
new: Saint Peter and Saint Paul 29 June
